name: Checkout Flow
description: End-to-end customer checkout from cart to order confirmation.
trigger: Customer clicks 'Proceed to Checkout' from cart page

steps.description: Check stock availability for all items. Remove unavailable items with user notification.
Form with address autocomplete. Save to user profile if checked.
Optional. Validate code exists, not expired, under max_uses. Calculate discount.
POST /api/payments/create-intent with order total. Returns client_secret.
Stripe.js confirmCardPayment with client_secret. Handle 3D Secure if required.
Insert order + order_items. Decrement book.stock_count atomically.
Transactional email with order summary, estimated delivery, and tracking link.
Show order number, items purchased, and estimated delivery date.

name: Review Moderation
description: Admin workflow for reviewing and approving or rejecting customer book reviews.

steps.description: New review appears in admin dashboard moderation queue.
Check for spam, profanity, and relevance to the book.
Set approved=true (visible) or delete. Optionally flag user.
Recalculate avg_rating on books table after approval.

name: Inventory Reorder Alert
description: Automated alert when book stock drops below reorder threshold.
trigger: book.stock_count drops below 10 after order placement

steps.description: After order_item creation, check if book.stock_count < reorder_threshold.
Insert row in reorder_alerts table with book_id and current_stock.
Send email to admin with low-stock book details and suggested reorder quantity.
